zh.lifeSummary: 當Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg於大約1248年出生在薩辛斯達爾時，她的父親Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme37歲，母親Beatrix von Böhmen24歲。她於1267年5月16日之前與Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1316年12月20日在波蘭沃也奧特沃 申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉享年69歲，埋葬在波蘭札德尼波莫斯吉申傑。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg于大约1248年出生在薩辛斯達爾时，她的父亲Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme37岁，母亲Beatrix von Böhmen24岁。她于1267年5月16日之前与Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1316年12月20日在波兰沃也奧特沃 申傑n斯吉波維亞特 申傑n斯吉享年69岁，埋葬在波兰札德尼波莫斯吉申傑。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Brandenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from Brandenburg, the name of a province, its principal city, and numerous other places.

variants.name: Brandenberg
meanings: German and Swiss German: habitational name from any of several minor places called Brandenberg, for example in Bavaria and Rhineland.
German: in some cases, probably also a variant of   Brandenburg  .

variants.name: Brandenburger
meanings: German: habitational name for someone from Brandenburg (see   Brandenburg  ).

nameMeanings.name: Mechthilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: vel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Valerie  , and sometimes also of   Valentine .

variants.name: Valerie
meanings: From the French form of the Latin name Valeria, feminine of Valerius, an old Roman family name apparently derived from valere ‘to be healthy, strong’. The name owes its popularity as a male name in France to the cult of a 3rd-century saint who was converted to Christianity by Martial of Limoges. The masculine form Valery is found occasionally in England in the 16th century, but by the 17th century had fallen into disuse.

variants.name: Valentine
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mechtilde
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg was born about 1248, in Stendal, Saxony, her father, Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme, was 37 and her mother, Beatrix von Böhmen, was 24. She married Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I before 16 May 1267. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 20 December 1316, in Szczecin District, Szczecin Voivodeship, Poland, at the age of 69, and was buried in Szczecin, West Pomerania, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg est née environ 1248, à Stendal, Sachsen, son père, Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Beatrix von Böhmen, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I avant 16 mai 1267. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 20 décembre 1316, à Powiat szczeciński, Województwo Szczecińskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterrée à Szczecin, Zachodniopomorskie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg um 1248 in Stendal, Sachsen geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme 37 und ihre Mutter Beatrix von Böhmen 24. Sie hat vor 16. Mai 1267 Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 20. Dezember 1316 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Powiat szczeciński, Woiwodschaft Stettin, Polen und wurde in Szczecin, Zachodniopomorskie, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg è nata il circa 1248 nel Stendal, Sachsen, sua padre, Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Beatrix von Böhmen, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I prima del 16 maggio 1267. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 20 dicembre 1316, nel Powiat szczeciński, Województwo Szczecińskie, Polonia, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolta a Szczecin, Zachodniopomorskie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburgが約1248年にサチセンステンダルで生まれた時，父Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Frommeは37歳，母Beatrix von Böhmenは24歳であった。1267年5月16日以前にBarnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1316年12月20日にポーランドウオジュoドズトウオ スズクズエシnスキポウィアト スズクズエシnスキで69歳で死去し，ポーランドザチオドニオプオモースキスズクズエシンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg(이)가 대략 1248년 작센 스텐다에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrix von Böhmen(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1267년 5월 16일 이전 Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1316년 12월 20일 폴란드 보jwo드즈트보 스즈치시n스키 파위앳 스즈치시n스키에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 잭드니오폼르스키 스즈치신에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg nasceu aproximadamente 1248, em Stendal, Sachsen, seu pai, Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Beatrix von Böhmen, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I antes 16 de maio de 1267. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 20 de dezembro de 1316, em Powiat szczeciński, Województwo Szczecińskie, Polônia, com 69 anos, e foi sepultada em Szczecin, Zachodniopomorskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg родилась около 1248 г. в местности стендаль, сачсен, её отцу по имени Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrix von Böhmen, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I перед 16 май 1267 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 20 декабря 1316 г. в местности поуят сзкзесиnски, воджюoдзтво сзкзесиnски, Польша в возрасте 69 лет и была похоронена в местности сзкзесин, зачодниопоморски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Princess Mechthilde vel Mathilde von Brandenburg nació aproximadamente 1248, en Stendal, Sachsen, su papá, Markgraf Otto III. von Brandenburg der Fromme, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Beatrix von Böhmen, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Barnim "Dobry" Gryfita Pomorski I antes de 16 de mayo de 1267. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 20 de diciembre de 1316, en Powiat szczeciński, Województwo Szczecińskie, Polonia, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultada en Szczecin, Zachodniopomorskie, Polonia.
